sn23.18:1.1:
1
Sāvatthinidānaṁ. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā rādho bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "‘anattadhammo, anattadhammo’ti, bhante, vuccati. Katamo nu kho, bhante, anattadhammo"ti?
sn23.18:1.2:
"Rūpaṁ kho, rādha, anattadhammo, vedanā anattadhammo, saññā anattadhammo, saṅkhārā anattadhammo, viññāṇaṁ anattadhammo. Evaṁ passaṁ … pe … nāparaṁ itthattāyāti pajānātī"ti.
Aṭṭhamaṁ.
